data.raceComments: {"comment":"9. CHLOE FIRST was well in commission last start over 1208m at Kyneton beaten 2.25 lengths. The rider recommended that the blinkers be applied next time, and they have. Maps well, and Nolen is a key jockey engagement. In a top barn and can go one better. 5. PALLADIUM resumes and has trialled well. He just missed three back at Wangaratta on debut and didn't have the best of luck in the two following. Has an inside gate, finally, and he will be naturally improved. 8. PRINCESS PRUSSIA is close to breaking through after two consecutive placings. Was a little plainer at Kerang last time, but the nose defeat over 1200m at Yarra Valley prior stacks right up. She will hit the line hard. 2. MORE GIVE IT resumes off a near miss at Donald this trip and would be a hope if presented forward this time around. 11. LEI has gone well at the Flemington jumpouts for her return to the race track. Has Coffey aboard and keep a close eye on the betting.","runners":[9,5,8,2,11],"exclusive":false}
